landing.title: Build, Test & Deploy
landing.subtitle: Create custom business AI agents, validate them through deterministic grading pipelines, and expose them as API endpoints — all from one platform.

agentBuilder.title: Agent Builder
agentBuilder.description: Configure agents with system prompts, skills, tools and extensions. Multi-model support.

grading.title: Deterministic Grading
grading.description: 6 criterion types: output match, schema validation, tool usage, safety check, LLM judge and more.

api.title: API Endpoints
api.description: Expose agents as JSON-RPC endpoints with API key auth, rate limiting and usage tracking.

security.title: Secure by Design
security.description: Owner-only Firestore rules, hashed API keys, server-side key management, sandboxed execution.

orchestration.title: Multi-Agent
orchestration.subtitle: Build sophisticated workflows with agent teams, pipelines, and meta-agents that create other agents.

teams.title: Agent Teams
teams.description: Run multiple specialized agents in parallel, sequential, or conditional modes. A coordinator synthesizes their outputs into unified results.

pipelines.title: Agent Pipelines
pipelines.description: Chain agents into step-by-step workflows where each agent's output feeds the next. Built-in error handling and input mapping.

metaAgent.title: Meta-Agent
metaAgent.description: Describe what you need in plain language. The meta-agent creates a fully configured agent — system prompt, skills, tools, and grading suite.

autoResearch.title: Self-Improving
autoResearch.subtitle: Your agents run experiments, measure results, and optimize themselves in a tight feedback loop.

autotune.title: AutoTune
autotune.description: Iteratively mutate system prompts using LLM-guided strategies. Each iteration is graded, and only improvements are kept — hill-climbing to the best config.

autofix.title: AutoFix
autofix.description: Analyze failing grading cases, diagnose root causes, and automatically patch the system prompt to fix specific weaknesses.

stressLab.title: Stress Lab
stressLab.description: Generate adversarial test cases — prompt injections, edge cases, ambiguous inputs — and harden your agent's prompt against vulnerabilities.

tournament.title: Tournament Arena
tournament.description: Pit multiple model and config combinations against each other. A multi-round tournament reveals the best quality/cost/latency trade-off.

evolution.title: Evolution Engine
evolution.description: Multi-dimensional genetic optimization across prompt, model, and thinking level. Population-based search with crossover, mutation, and natural selection.

distillation.title: Distillation
distillation.description: Transfer knowledge from expensive teacher models to cheaper students. Maintain quality while dramatically reducing inference costs.

observability.title: Observability &
observability.subtitle: Track every token, every call, every cost — with full session tracing and pay-per-use billing.

sessions.title: Session Tracing
sessions.description: Full observability with event timelines, token counts, cost tracking, and tool execution traces for every agent session.

billing.title: Pay-per-Token
billing.description: Transparent usage-based billing with per-agent breakdown, historical charts, and multi-provider cost tracking.

hero.tagline: Not just another coding agent. Mine.
hero.placeholder: e.g. I need an agent that reviews PRs for security vulnerabilities, checks OWASP Top 10, and generates fix suggestions...
hero.signInToSave: Sign in to save your agent

purposeGate.title: Purpose Gate
purposeGate.description: Ask the user for a session purpose before starting the chat. The answer is injected into the system prompt for focused agent behavior.
purposeGate.question: Purpose Question
purposeGate.questionPlaceholder: What is the purpose of this session?

tillDone.title: TillDone Mode
tillDone.description: Force the agent to maintain a task list. The agent must create tasks before executing and complete all tasks before finishing.

agentBranding.title: Agent Branding
agentBranding.description: Customize the visual identity of this agent

toolOverrides.title: Tool Overrides
toolOverrides.description: Override default tool behavior with custom wrapper code
toolOverrides.noOverridesDesc: Override read, write, edit, or bash tools with custom behavior

metaAgent.title: Create with AI
metaAgent.description: Describe what you need in plain language. The AI will design a complete agent specification — system prompt, skills, tools, and grading criteria.
metaAgent.prompt: Describe the agent you want to build...
metaAgent.promptPlaceholder: e.g. I need an agent that reviews pull requests for security vulnerabilities and coding standards, checks OWASP Top 10, and blocks merge if score is below 7/10...
metaAgent.minChars: Minimum 10 characters. Be as specific as possible for better results.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale as you grow. All plans include core agent building features.

usage.name: Usage
usage.description: Pay only for what you use — no limits

pricing.comparisonSubtitle: Everything you need to build, test, and deploy AI agents
pricing.usageNoteDesc: Pay only for what you use. Prices include a 20% Kopern platform fee on top of LLM provider costs.
pricing.commissionDesc: Covers infrastructure, tool execution, sandboxing, billing, and support.

apiKeys.subtitle: All MCP servers across your agents

github.noToken: No GitHub connection found. Please sign in with GitHub to connect repositories.

integrations.title: Connect Your Tools
integrations.subtitle: Link GitHub repos for code-aware agents, or connect any service via MCP — Slack, Jira, AWS, Notion, and more.

github.title: GitHub Integration
github.description: Agents read your code, review PRs, analyze dependencies, and suggest fixes — directly from your repositories.

mcp.title: MCP Connectors
mcp.description: Connect any external service via the Model Context Protocol. Slack, Linear, Notion, databases — your agents access them all.

workflow.title: End-to-End Workflows
workflow.description: Chain integrations: an agent reads a GitHub PR, checks Jira for context, posts a review, and updates Slack — fully automated.

bugReport.title: Report a Bug
bugReport.description: Help us improve Kopern by reporting issues you encounter.
bugReport.medium: Medium — feature broken but workaround exists
bugReport.high: High — critical blocker, data loss, or security issue
bugReport.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the bug in detail: what happened, what you expected, steps to reproduce...

optimize.title: Agent Optimization Lab
optimize.subtitle: Self-improving agent optimization powered by tight-loop experimentation with objective metrics as feedback signal.

descriptions.autotune: Hill-climbing optimization loop: iteratively refines your agent's system prompt by analyzing grading results and proposing targeted improvements. Keeps improvements, discards regressions.
descriptions.autofix: One-click fix: analyzes failed grading cases, diagnoses root causes, and patches your system prompt to pass. Verifies the fix with a full re-run.
descriptions.stress_lab: Adversarial red-team testing: generates attack cases (prompt injection, edge cases, hallucination traps, jailbreak attempts) and automatically hardens your agent.
descriptions.tournament: A/B tournament: pits different model/config combinations against your grading suite and ranks them by score, cost, and latency. Find the best config for YOUR use case.
descriptions.distillation: Cost optimizer: evaluates your agent on cheaper models and finds the best quality/cost ratio. Same quality for a fraction of the price.
descriptions.evolution: Multi-dimensional evolution: simultaneously optimizes prompt, model, thinking level, and more using population-based search. The most thorough optimization mode.

optimize.noSuitesDesc: Create a grading suite first to use the Optimization Lab.

planLimit.title: Plan limit reached
planLimit.description: Upgrade your plan or switch to usage-based billing to continue.
